query:
-- Verificar registros sem estabelecimento nas principais tabelas
SELECT 'arquivos' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN estabelecimentoId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_estabelecimento FROM arquivos
UNION ALL
SELECT 'procedimentos' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN estabelecimentoId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_estabelecimento FROM procedimentos
UNION ALL
SELECT 'convenios' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN estabelecimentoId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_estabelecimento FROM convenios
UNION ALL
SELECT 'comparacoes' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN estabelecimentoId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_estabelecimento FROM comparacoes
UNION ALL
SELECT 'divergencias' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN estabelecimentoId IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sem_estabelecimento FROM divergencias;
